---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One or two sentences describing what you want to build.

## Motivation

Why should OMNYX have this? What problem does it solve for users?

## Proposed solution

How might this work? Include any UI sketches, architecture thoughts, or reference implementations.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you chose this one.

## Area

- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Animation system
- [ ] Theme system
- [ ] AI Explanation Engine
- [ ] Backend proxy
- [ ] Swarm system
- [ ] Privacy modes
- [ ] New screen
- [ ] Other

## Good first issue?

- [ ] Yes, this could be scoped for a new contributor
- [ ] No, this requires deeper familiarity with the codebase
